summary: Alerting System testing completed successfully. All backend API tests passed (9/9). Frontend UI shows all alerting features working: ALERT ACTIVE badge, Active Alerts Banner, Live Event Stream with filters, sound toggle, pause/resume, clear buttons. Rule engine successfully triggers error_spike alerts when 12+ errors occur within 60s. Alert events are stored in traffic_events with correct structure (type=alert, metadata.alert_type). Cooldown mechanism prevents duplicate alerts within 120s.
passed_tests: POST /api/admin/events with type=error stores event in traffic_events
GET /api/admin/traffic/events?type=alert returns alert events with correct structure
Alert event has type=alert and metadata.alert_type field
Rule engine: posting 12+ error events within 60s triggers error_spike alert
Rule engine cooldown: duplicate error_spike alert NOT emitted within 120 seconds
GET /api/admin/traffic/summary returns all metric fields correctly
Demo mode events have demo=true flag preserved in metadata
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows ALERT ACTIVE badge when alerts active
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows Active Alerts Banner with alert type badges
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Live Event Stream shows Connected status
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Live Event Stream has Alerts Only filter option
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Live Event Stream has sound toggle button
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Live Event Stream has Pause/Resume button
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Live Event Stream has Clear button
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true shows all existing sections (KPIs, charts, funnel, health, strategy activity)
Frontend /admin/traffic?demo=true Raw Events table displays events with pagination
seed_data_creation: Created test error events to trigger error_spike alert
context_for_next_testing_agent: Alerting system is fully functional. Rule engine runs every 5 seconds and detects anomalies (error_spike, traffic_surge, disconnect_storm, strategy_flood, checkout_failures, suspicious_behavior). Alert events are stored in traffic_events collection with type='alert' and metadata.alert_type. Frontend displays alerts with red styling, ALERT ACTIVE badge, and Active Alerts Banner. Cooldown is 120 seconds per alert type. Demo mode suppresses founder emails but alerts still appear in UI.

rule_engine.alert_event_storage: Working - stored in traffic_events with correct structure
rule_engine.websocket_broadcast: Working - alerts broadcast to admin WS clients

api_endpoints.active_alerts: GET /api/admin/traffic/active-alerts - returns list of active alert types

frontend_ui.alert_active_badge: Shows in header when alerts are active
